# The Proposal

## Milestones

**M1 — Bug fixes and Bioconductor compliance (months 1–2)**
Fix the `loadBedGraphTrackFromURL` config-overwrite bug (#35), `autoscaleGroup` passthrough (#105), and all remaining NOTEs. *Deliverable: 0 ERRORs, 0 WARNINGs on Bioconductor devel.*

**M2 — API completeness (months 2–4)**
Implement the five features users have been asking for: CRAM local loading, `sortByTag` for BAM, sashimi plots for RNA-seq, `chromosomeColorMap` for GWAS, and flexible GWAS schema. *Deliverable: all seven open issues closed, new functions covered by tests.*

**M3 — Testing and CI (months 3–5)**
Replace the current untestable interactive tests with `shinytest2` headless tests, add regression coverage for M1–M2 fixes, and set up GitHub Actions CI on Linux, macOS, and Windows. *Deliverable: coverage $\geq$ 75% via `covr`; CI green on all three platforms.*

**M4 — Documentation (months 4–6)**
Write a "Getting Started" vignette (install → working app in 10 minutes) and a "Track Options Reference" vignette, replace the large demo apps with focused minimal examples (one per track type, under 60 lines each). *Deliverable: two new vignettes, updated pkgdown site.*

**M5 — LLM navigation module (months 6–9)**
Add `igvChatUI()` / `igvChatServer()` — an optional Shiny module that accepts conversational prompts and maps them to igvShiny API calls: navigate to a gene, load or remove tracks, sort reads by tag, group BedGraphs in autoscale mode. The module uses [`elmer`](https://elmer.tidyverse.org) (Claude, OpenAI, or local Ollama). Every prompt is sent with the current browser state — active locus, loaded tracks, genome assembly — so commands like *"add a track for the other sample"* or *"zoom out to show the flanking genes"* work contextually. The Ollama path matters for hospitals where sending patient genomic data to an external API is simply not allowed. `elmer` is a `Suggests` dependency; the rest of the package is unaffected if it is not installed. *Deliverable: `igvChatUI/Server` in igvShiny; three providers documented and CI-tested with mocks; "Natural Language Navigation" vignette; showcase demo app.*
